description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the eclipse-temurin:17-jdk-jammy Docker image that sets up the Android SDK in before_script by updating apt, installing wget unzip git, defining ANDROID_HOME, downloading and extracting the command‑line tools zip, moving the tools directory, adding the SDK tools to PATH, installing the platform, platform‑tools and build‑tools versions from variables, accepting licenses, and making ./gradlew executable. Define variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK and ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS. Add a build stage with two jobs: assembleDebug runs ./gradlew assembleDebug, is interruptible, and uploads FlashAlerte/build/outputs/ as artifacts; lintDebug runs ./gradlew -Pci --console=plain :app:lintDebug -PbuildDir=lint, is interruptible, always uploads FlashAlerte/lint/reports/lint-results-debug.html as an exposed artifact named lint-report. Both jobs inherit the before_script and have no additional rules or deployment targets.
